description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a striking neon green and black color scheme. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic mesh and faux leather, with black marbled overlays providing structural support and visual contrast. The shoe has a thick, sculpted sole with deep grooves and a textured pattern, likely designed for enhanced grip and shock absorption. Neon green laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, and the collar is padded for ankle support. Subtle branding details are present, including a stylized black swoosh-like design on the side and text on the heel. The overall design is modern and bold, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A bold neon green and black high-top sneaker with a sculpted sole, marbled overlays, and padded collar, designed for athletic and urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the neon green upper, black marbled overlays, stylized black swoosh, and thick sculpted sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross neon green laces, perforated toe box, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color scheme, marbled overlays, and the continuation of the black swoosh design.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel tab, and subtle text branding on the heel counter.
